reviews.text: Waste of time & loss of $350 strategy fee, $4500 retainer fee was refunded. No strategy for case my son was told not a fit for firm and sent away with referrals. If you don’t want the case say that before taking peoples money!
reviews.ownerResponse: Ma'am, unfortunately, you were not in my office for the retainer meeting.  You were not privy to an unacceptable behavior issue AFTER our case strategy session that occurred in my office. We are not a bus, and we are not required to take every person who wishes to hire us.  Due to attorney client privilege, I cannot share more.  I really wish I could! Additionally, both my paralegal and I were in agreement on this necessary decision.

reviews.text:
I hired Ms. Rossberg in 2012 for my divorce.  She was kind, compassionate, and highly competent - a guiding light through a very difficult time.  In 2015, I turned to her again when my ex-husband violated our divorce decree, and once more she handled the matter thoroughly and expeditiously.  Most recently, in 2025, I consulted Ms. Rossberg to review my prenuptial agreement.  She was genuinely excited for the next chapter in my life and provided insightful, practical, and sound advice.

While I hope I don’t need Ms. Rossberg’s services again, it would only be because life no longer calls for them - not because of any shortcoming on her part.  In fact, I couldn’t recommend Ms. Rossberg more highly.

I was told to call this law firm by 2 other law firms. I did, and was pleasantly surprised when I was told they do not like doing contested custody cases. They do not like drawing on emergency cases. The paralegal was busy getting paperwork done and I was made to feel like I was keeping her from doing her job. I was not impressed at all with the unprofessionalism that I was shown.
reviews.ownerResponse: I apologize you had this experience.  High Conflict Cases require a tremendous time commitment to do a good job. With that being said, there is a tremendous shortage of available divorce and custody lawyers.  Our phones literally ring all day long.  We try to limit how many cases we take so we can get good results. I would imagine my paralegal was working on the many trials we had this past month. People count on us to get good results at trial. I’m sorry you felt marginalized but her priorities were correct taking care of our existing clients and their cases.

reviews.text:
Plenty of experience and looks at the short term & long term goals, and possible scenarios. I needed a divorce & parenting plan. She balanced my needs, my child’s needs, and conflictions with the judge & other party.

Disillusion of marriage was fair & equitable. I will be using her for future parenting plan consultation & prenuptial contract consultation in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for this kind review. Just doing my job.  Glad I helped!!!

reviews.text: Sunday is the best attorney, she cares and listens and gets stuff done. If you want to win your case you will have much better luck doing it with Sunday on your team. Can’t recommend enough.
Just don’t. Worst experience and a waste of money!

reviews.ownerResponse: This person was never a client and is a member/church goer at Victory Christian Church. This unnamed person made positive reviews for Victory Church and many business owned by its members. This is a personal attack due to me leaving that church and being critical of its pastor and staff. Ironically, this review was left after I publicly criticized Victory and its preaching for tithes that were not used to provided "food in the storehouse" despite relying upon the scripture to get churchgoers to tithe. (Malachi 3:8-10) I previously attended that church, but left due to its hypocrisy. This is a false review that was retaliatory in nature by a "so-called" Christian who attends Victory Christian Church.

reviews.text: Sunday and her secretary were great to work with. Very punctual and thorough with what I needed. Great communication and completing my case. Would recommend 💯

Sunday Rossberg is an outstanding lawyer. When we started looking for a lawyer, we know we needed one that would fight for us or tell us that we didn't have a case. Sunday was upfront that we had a case and she never backed down. We have used Sunday for many years. Sunday understands what we are going through and never looked at us like we were not worth it. If anyone ever ask who we have as a lawyer, I tell them with a full heart to go talk to Sunday.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wendy, we think the world of your family!  Thank you for trusting us, and thank you for the kind words!
Thank you Viki.  I appreciate your support.

reviews.text: Attorney, Ms. Sunday Rossberg is a god send! Sunday was available at a moment’s notice when my daughter and I had an emergency and needed a GREAT attorney NOW! We both were searching reviews when we came across Sunday’s reviews. Her reputation is she’s a fighter to the end, and she represents her clients well, everyone is happy with her guidance and outcome. Sunday was with another client as they were running a little over, we chose to wait because a lot hinged on legal advice that we needed asap! Sunday came out and welcomed us into her office and showed compassion for my daughter and her situation. She gave advice and avenues that my daughter needed. We will always go back to Sunday for advice and legal representation. She showed warmth and compassion in a career field that is tough not just on clients, but tough on attorneys and judges too! This we understand. God bless Sunday, she’s a hard worker and represents her clients very well, there’s no fluff, she’s direct and to the point, just what was needed! Me and my daughter highly recommend Ms. Sunday Rossberg! She’s a true fighter and a go getter, she will fight for YOU!
reviews.ownerResponse: I am truly humbled by your kind words.  Thank you so much for this review and the many referrals.

reviews.text: Sunday has been there for me and my family multiple times the last 12 plus years.  Absolute professional and now a dear friend.  I highly recommend Sunday for any custody issues.
reviews.ownerResponse: Andy, it was a pleasure working for you and getting to know your family over the years. Its a true honor and I am humbled by your kind words. Also, thank you for the many referrals over the years.

reviews.text: Possibly the worst experience I have ever had with a so-called professional. She had never met either myself or my son, who is a disabled veteran, but her first words to him were, "You do meth, don't you? And don't lie to me, because I know you do." She based her judgement solely upon his appearance (he is permanently wounded from his service to our country and because of chronic pain, his appetite is affected, and he is thin). Even after explaining this fact to her, she persisted in telling us that she was an expert in recognizing "meth-heads" and refused to apologize. She spent our $200 session self-aggrandizing and singing her own accolades. (She did not refund our money) My son was there for custody advice, and she told him it was basically hopeless. As a footnote, we hired a wonderful, competent attorney and my son now has complete and full custody and is full of hope! Run, do not walk, from this horrible woman. She has a terrible reputation around town. Just ask other attorneys. I noted Ms. Rossberg's response to my review and would add that her inuendo that she would like to share more but can't is so bogus and unethical. When she accused my son of being a meth addict, we immediately offered to submit urine and blood tests to prove her unfounded allegations wrong. We offered to share his stacks of medical records from the VA with her. She declined. She based her entire attack solely upon a superficial and uninformed assessment of his appearance. Instead of admitting that she made a hasty error in judgement, she doubles down to further malign him in her response to my review by insinuating that "she knows so much but can't share it" and includes child custody law to imply he is as a danger to his child. As I stated earlier, he won full custody, and no allegations of drug abuse were ever posed by the other side. It is further testament to the character, or lack thereof of this horrible individual. She should be very ashamed. I thank God we dodged a bigger bullet, being alerted by her behavior, to go elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I can only assume these initials are those of Vicki Haines, who authored a similar negative review for my judgeship application which was published. She continues to update her false, defamatory, and delusional narrative of events that are taken out of context, or certainly never occurred. I've had to block her online due to her harassing behavior.

Ms. Haines has been writing similar, negative online reviews since 2016 over one single meeting where she attended.

Despite Ms. Haines' opinion, several Montana judges and members of this community wrote letters of support when I applied for a district court judgeship. I was also the recipient of a State Bar Pro Bono Award for my exemplary work protecting a child from abuse. I was nominated by Judge Wayne Phillips who proceeded over that case.

Hence, others professionals do not share Ms. Haines' opinion which she is certainly entitled to. Unfortunately, she is someone who only writes negative reviews and has criticized Lithia Motors, Sonic and Maria's Restaurant in her reviews. She is sadly a troubled person who is unhappy with life and selects a target.

As an attorney, even if I disagree, I cannot disclose certain confidences, which renders me unable to address all of Ms. Haines' false narratives and delusions, although I would like to do so.

It is important to note that in all child custody actions, the Court weighs a case under the best interests of the child test. See Section 40-4-212 MCA.

I don’t make up that test. I just follow it. One factor of the best interests of the child test is: “ (g) chemical dependency, as defined in 53-24-103, or chemical abuse on the part of either parent; ) chemical dependency, as defined in 53-24-103, or chemical abuse on the part of either parent.” Each factor needs to be assessed including that last one.

Many of the inflammatory statements that she made up about our meeting were false, and I would love to go toe to toe with her to rebut and refute them. However, I cannot get into the details of that meeting that would allow me to do so.

Anyone who takes time to update a review that is nearly 8 years old appears to be an unwell individual. I hope Ms. Haines finds happiness. Previously, before they lost their post, she was a Pastor's wife. Maybe someday she can get past this bitterness.

reviews.text: Sunday Rossberg is one of the best family law lawyers in the Great Falls, Montana area. She treats her clients with compassion, kindness, and like family. If you need a top divorce attorney or child custody lawyer, then I highly recommend Rossberg Law Office.

Truthfully, one of the worst experiences I’ve had with a lawyer. At first, Sunday seemed like a great fit for my divorce. My case is not high stress. A quicky divorce is all I was after. I told her I would like to retain her and we agreed to meet at her office to have me sign a fee agreement on my lunch break. I show up and to my surprise she was unavailable because she had scheduled meetings over my appointment and no one informed me. Her assistant, Angie, was extremely unprofessional about the situation. I explained that I was here on my lunch break and didn’t want to waste my time. To which she replied “okay” and then disappeared. I assumed she was going back to talk to Sunday, get my paperwork, or anything. But I waited for 10 minutes and nothing happened. So I left. Sunday called me back and accused me of storming out. I explained that I did not storm out and that I was on lunch so I didn’t have a lot of time to wait. She told me she still wanted to represent me so I said I would think about it. I called back the following week to see if she could still represent me since all the reviews say she’s a great lawyer. She gave me this huge speech about how her assistant doesn’t think I’ll be a good fit because scheduling over my appointments would happen a lot and she doesn’t think I’ll be happy. I tried to explain that my issues weren’t that she had to schedule meetings over my appointment, it was that I wasn’t informed. To which she replied “yeah that will happen.” That is extremely unprofessional and uncalled for in an already sensitive time in anyone’s life. I feel I should also note that during our initial consultation she bad mouthed a lawyer I had previously met with and accused him of domestic abuse. I am here to say that Sunday and Angie did not live up to the reviews and I would not recommend her to anyone.

EDIT: I am not surprised Sunday felt the need to respond. Though I love how she can take the time to research me thoroughly but doesn’t have the time to call her “client.” This response comes only after I declined to speak to Sunday when she called me about the review I left. She is a petty and unprofessional lawyer. Her assistant is also unpleasant to converse with. I stand by my review and decision. I can’t attest to her lawyer skills as I never got the chance to work with her (thank goodness), but Sunday’s people skills are absolutely appalling.
reviews.ownerResponse: As a legal professional, I represent multiple clients who often have an emergency just like an emergency room. Like any other business, including a doctor's office, a dentist's office, a chiropractic office, and countless other professional offices, there is no question that we sometimes run behind or need to reschedule appointments due to emergent matters. It is true Ms. Henry came into my office as she stated to "sign a fee agreement on [her] lunch break." I was in my office with an existing client addressing an emergent, time sensitive matter and was running behind like many other professionals. I was alerted Ms. Henry was in my office and then, the next thing I heard was my front glass door slamming loudly. I heard it in my closed office down the hall. After my emergent appointment with a client had concluded, I called Ms. Henry back and asked about her "storming out" as reported by my paralegal and supported by the slamming of the door. There were discussions during that call, which some of those discussions, were not fully reported by Ms. Henry in her post. After some discussion with my paralegal and her interactions with Ms. Henry, it was determined that Ms. Henry may not be a good fit for our office as there were concerns we could not meet all of her expectations and could not guarantee as a law office that we would not run late from time to time. It was not possible to promise that nor would it be possible to promise that we would not have to reschedule Ms. Henry's appointments if another client had a critical, emergent and pressing matter. For example, when a person has an appointment at a vet clinic, it is reasonable that a person who did not make an appointment, who has an emergent matter, will definitely be seen before the person who has the non-emergent matter. It is true we did not call Ms. Henry and alert her we were running behind. We did not have the time in the ten (10) minutes the appointment ran over to call Ms. Henry in advance to tell her the appointment would run over by ten (10) minutes. It is important to note that there is a long list of businesses Ms. Henry has criticized on her Google Reviews. There is not one business she's interacted with where she has posted a positive review. The businesses that Ms. Henry has criticized include: Dr. Mark Johnson, Ph.D., a licensed neuropsychologist at Benefis Health System, SpringHill Suites, and Fiesta En Jalisco. She complained with scheduling and rescheduling with Dr. Johnson's office. She complained about customer service at SpringHill Suites, and customer service at Fiesta En Jalisco. If you look at Ms. Henry's Google Reviews (assuming she does not remove them), she only posts negative reviews and has yet to post a positive review. At the end of the day, our office realizes that we cannot make everyone happy and we are very selective on who we represent. We do not wish to take someone's hard earned money knowing that it is unlikely that we will meet that person's expectations. We do not collect money from everyone who wishes to pay us. It should be noted I did a courtesy follow up with Ms. Henry which she did not mention. Later, I contacted Ms. Henry to discuss this review and she hung up on me so I had no ability to address or rectify this issue with her. Additionally, it should be noted, Ms. Henry mentioned in her negative review that "all the reviews say she's (i.e. Ms. Rossberg) a great lawyer". This leads me to believe that this negative review is because I declined to represent Ms. Henry as she stated in her Google Review. I truly hope there is some professional somewhere who will be able to satisfy Ms. Henry's expectations!

reviews.text: Sunday is an incredible attorney. She will fight zealously for you and the best interest of your family's needs. She makes her clients feel like the most important people as she prioritizes each of them. Sunday takes every case extremely seriously. I 100% recommend her for any family legal issue you are experiencing.

Sunday Rossberg was very professional & helped me through a very difficult period in my life. She was sincere & honest & always made sure to help me with as much as possible while guiding me through a situation I knew absolutely nothing about. She was available anytime I had questions or concerns & consistently very informative. Her Paralegal was also very professional, available & helpful as well. I will always appreciate what she did for me in a time of need.

I chose Hoyt & Blewett to represent my daughter and I, when we were rear ended in our vehicle.
I could not have made a better decision regarding our representation.
Drew Blewett and the entire team were friendly, caring and professional throughout the entire process.
They immediately initiated a “Care Team” response, that handled our medical appointments, follow ups and litigation efforts.
I am confident that the Hoyt & Blewett team secured the best results for my family and I could not recommend Hoyt & Blewett enough.
reviews.ownerResponse: James, thank you for your thoughtful words. We’re honored you trusted us to guide your family through such a difficult time.

reviews.text:
Drew Blewett from Hoyt & Blewett Law Firm, Great Falls MT got a claim settled against a large corporation following damage to my vehicle from a runaway cart operator in their parking lot.  I had no satisfaction dealing or settling this claim on my own.  Drew showed professionalism and patience that I had lost along the way.  He communicated with me and kept me informed of the progress on a regular basis. He helped calm my worries and frustration.  I highly recommend Drew.  He succeeded in getting this settled when I could not.  Hire this young man!
Bev
reviews.ownerResponse: Bev, thank you for recognizing Drew’s professionalism and steady communication. Your trust and recommendation mean a great deal to our team.

reviews.text: I contacted Hoyt and Blewett after my accident upon seeing positive reviews, they did not disappoint! I worked with Connor Murphy, he was very responsive to messages, easy to communicate with, explained everything at a level for me to understand, he went above and beyond helping me take care of medical needs and getting compensated. Would highly recommend this firm!

The Blewett’s and their associates were very skilled and professional in every aspect of our case, and at the same time treated everyone involved, on both sides, with courtesy and respect. We were extremely satisfied with their representation and with the compensation and settlement terms they were able to obtain for us. I recommend them highly.

It was great working with Anders Blewett @ Hoyt & Blewett. Anders helped us navigate the process after our daughter was hurt in a car accident. He advocated for her and continued to stay on top of it all. You can get so busy with doctors so it is great having someone in your corner who knows the process and takes the hassle out of your hands. Anders communicate with us regularly, He was there to explain any questions we had. I highly recommend this law firm. Anders did a great job!
My lawyer was great! He handled my personal injury case fast and got the job done. Very professional and easy to work with. Highly recommend Drew Blewett.

I had Connor Murphy represent me recently for my injury case. Not only did Connor help guide me through the legal process, frankly I knew nothing about, but also was available to me at any time when I had questions come up.
Hoyt and Blewett came highly recommended to me and I want to do the same for someone else. Even if you do not believe you have a case they will take your call and just be honest with you. I cannot thank them enough for their help and guidance through what could have been a much scarier process.

I was in a car accident last year. Anders Blewett was contacted by my stepfather. Blewett helped me find doctors and therapy. It helped so much, I got my life back on track. I highly recommend Anders Blewett and the Hoyt & Blewett PLLC.

I was involved in a car accident where the other person was at fault. I needed help and was referred to Hoyt & Blewett PLLC. They helped me get the best possible medical attention to recover my health and finances. I am so grateful for Drew and Anders assistance. Their communication throughout the entire process, how the handled everything so professionally, and how they helped me recover with my health and finances was absolutely amazing. They are the best in the entire state and I would highly recommend that if you're in a situation as I was, to contact Hoyt & Blewett PLLC because you will get the best customer service and results possible!
Drew Blewett is everything you could ask for in a lawyer. Very prompt, professional and the support I felt through the whole process I am greatful for. I highly recommend this firm.

I had a great experience working with Connor Murphy at Hoyt & Blewett. He was extremely professional, responsive, and always kept me informed throughout the process. I really appreciated his knowledge, wisdom, and dedication to my personal injury case. Connor made the entire process stress-free. He took care of everything, which gave me so much peace of mind and truly took the weight off my shoulders. He achieved a great settlement, and I couldn’t be happier with the outcome. I highly recommend Connor Murphy to anyone in need of legal representation.

Connor Murphy of Hoyt and Blewett did a truly outstanding job of negotiating a fair settlement for my injury. I thought that it would take longer in order to be able to get a resolution to my claim, but he did it in record time. I was very pleased with the work Mr. Murphy completed for me. I would not hesitate to recommend them to anyone who had the same type of problem that I encountered.

Drew Blewett took on my personal injury case after I was involved in a MVA and I had to deal with the at-fault-opponent's difficult and uncooperative insurance company. With Drew's outstanding expertise and accurate research, he achieved a positive outcome for me. Drew was always willing to answer all my questions and concerns with patience in a timely manner. I highly recommend this law firm, especially Drew Blewett. I also want to thank you Anders Blewett and Joslyn for all the additional assistance.
Great customer service by Drew and his team. I was involved in a car accident and they provided excellent service to help me with my claim, in a very timely and professional manner.

Truly appreciate Connor Murphy and Alex Moore! They went above and beyond to not only make me feel heard but also their suggestions in regards to rehab after my accident were paramount to my recovery. Quick responses, and when needed, took the extra time to discuss next steps and anything else I may have had questions on. Great team and they definitely come HIGHLY recommended!
Anders worked quickly and diligently to secure our settlement. His communication was always prompt.
Ander's was great, He resolved our claim efficiently and to our satisfaction.  Ander's was professional, kept us updated, extremely knowledgeable. Highly  recommended!

There is no good thing to say about how this firm treated me. Kampfer took all my disability papers and I didn't hear anything from him for months. I would have called him earlier but he said it can take a long time. When I did call I got his secretary who lied and said she sent me a letter and left me a message on my phone, neither of which ever happened. When I asked for the phone # she called me on to prove she didn't call me she refused and told me to get out or else. Long story short I am screwed out of my disability for too much time passed. And that secretary is a mean awful person who acts like a child making faces at me laughing at me and threatening me. Horrible person!

Robert Kampfer took my husband's Veteran's disability case that had been dragging on and made it FINALLY happen.  Without his guidance and help no doubt we would still be trying to figure things out - but thankfully he guided us and submitted everything that brought a 100% rating, a true godsend.

Very professional law office ,MR ROBERT F. KAMPHER TOOK MY CASE ALL THE WAY TO THE SUPREME COURT,FOR VETERANS COMPENSATION VIET NAM WAR RELATED.I WILL ALWAYS BE GREATFUL TO HIM AND GOD. FOR THE REST OF MY LIFE.THANK YOU JESUS FOR LAYING DOWN YOUR LIFE FOR ALL AND THANK YOU MR. ROBERT F. KAMPHER.

Worst attorney in the state. He lies, he tries to force clients into signing away their rights to a speedy trial, he does not work for his clients he helps the prosecutor by not presenting g evidence that proves a persons innocence and when he is called out on his lies he quits the case. If you are looking for an attorney who will stand up for you and fight your case this guy IS NOT the guy you want!
Mr. Buehler gave me superb service and provided the influence necessary to obtain the outcome we wanted. It would be my pleasure to do business again with Mr. Buehler. Will Lee - Lewistown.

I dealt with Craig and his office from Bozeman.  They were professional, kind and understanding. I appreciated the time they took to assist us and the communication regarding our situation. Melody is very sweet and she and Craig were amazing to work with.
Top rate - had an interesting and winning case to work with.
Michelle is absolutely amazing. She operates with ethics and humility, and goes above and beyond for her clients. I’ve used several lawyers in this area. She is the only one I would recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so very much for the incredibly kind review!

reviews.text:
I was feeling as if the bottom had fallen out of my life after a very traumatizing situation. I reached out to Michele at Meridian Law at the recommendation of a previous co-worker. From the beginning, she was realistic about the possible outcome and what was entailed in the process. At no time did I feel like I was not being heard or that I was just a number in a queue.
We were in for a fight, but Michele and her team helped me patiently navigate the process. If you want someone who is in the fight for you and with you, Michele at Meridian Law should be your choice.
never even called me back I left multiple messages if I could give zero Stars I would
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Ainsworth:
We want to apologize for any missed calls that may have occurred in relationship to you reaching out for possible legal representation. We receive many calls everyday, but we diligently strive to timely respond to them. That said, we have reviewed our records thoroughly, and we do not have any evidence of any calls from you at anytime, nor messages. So, we’re not entirely sure what occurred. That said, we will continue to be as responsive as possible to prospective clients. We are very sorry for whatever occurred here. We wish you the very best in finding legal representation.

reviews.text:
Refused to take my case
Tennant vs Land Lord...
I get to go to court without representation.
😭
reviews.ownerResponse: We are very sorry that we could not take your case.  Unfortunately, while we wish that we could, we simply cannot take every prospective case that comes into our office.  We have to balance our existing cases and emergent deadlines for those Clients against our ability to take on a new matter.  We are sorry that we could not be of assistance.  Unfortunately, our Team just does not have "enough time in the day" to help every single person that calls us on a new possible case.  It is definitely not a representation of our quality of work for existing Clients, nor our compassion and care for those that are suffering through legal issues.  We hope that you are able to find another lawyer to assist you.  We wish you the very best!

reviews.text: Michele is a powerfully smart and experienced attorney - I was lucky enough to work with her on a consultancy basis and she assisted me in gaining the confidence I needed to handle a troubling conflict with a business partner.  I value her expertise so much that I have used her again.  I'm very grateful to have found her and would recommend her to anyone seeking an experienced, reasonable, realistic and respectful attorney who is well-networked in Montana and has a 20 year record of experience with the law.
reviews.ownerResponse: Tara:  You don’t know how much this meant to us, especially after a high conflict week of lawyering.  It made our Team tear up.  It was truly our pleasure to assist you.  You are a gracious, intelligent, and kind woman, and we wish more people were like you in the World.  Please don’t ever hesitate to reach out for assistance.  It is our honor to work with you!

reviews.text: A colleague and I reached out to Michelle for guidance on a case. We were inexperienced and Michelle was patient and explained things with respect and candor that helped us to make an educated decision. She spent nearly 90 minutes with us in the initial meeting to make sure we fully understood the options available to us. Michelle's patience and desire to support ordinary people seeking legal assistance was impressive. She is what an attorney should be!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Coralee, for taking the time to share your experience. It was truly heartwarming to read your kind words. I'm honored to have had the opportunity to assist you with your case.

reviews.text:
Never got a return call or email after 2 calls and email. I allowed several days between calls and email. To date its been a week and I've found help elsewhere.  ......

UPDATE, This review only reflects the inability to reach someone. It does not reflect the ability of the attorney. This is a small practice without extensive admin support. Both the admin and attorney reached out and apologized for not getting back to me. They went  above and beyond to apologize. If I did need an attorney I would absolutely give them a try. Hopefully they will change their messages about a 24 hour response.  It's great to strive for that, but set expectations according to what they know they can do. We all have that challenge.
reviews.ownerResponse: Christina: We are very sorry we missed your calls/email seeking assistance.  Unfortunately, it takes us some time to respond to prospective clients, because of our existing workload.  However, we apologize that we were not more timely in responding to you.  We are glad you found assistance elsewhere.  We wish you the best!
Thank you!!!

reviews.text: I am pleased to share my exceptional experience with Meridian Law, PLLC and Michele Braukmann. Michele's professionalism, patience, and unwavering support during my employment litigation were truly remarkable, even when I may not have been the easiest client to work with. Her deep expertise, knowledge, and commitment to honesty make her a standout attorney. Over the past four years, Michele has not only been a legal guide but also a trusted confidante, navigating me through a myriad of legal complexities with patience and understanding. I have confidently recommended her to others and will continue to do so. Michele is not only a distinguished attorney but also a compassionate, genuine, and dedicated professional who epitomizes excellence in her field. Thank you, Michele, for your exceptional support, unwavering dedication, and the genuine care you provide to your clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Oh my word, Tyrel.  I'm literally crying reading this.  These are some of the most heartfelt and amazing words that I could ever imagine.  That you took the time to leave this review, it speaks volumes about you, as a human being, and it reminds me exactly why I represented you.  You are an amazing person, and I was so blessed, even in bad circumstances, to work with you.  I will hold these words so close to my heart.  I cannot tell you how much they mean to me.  I pray and hope, always, for you and your precious girlies' successful life moving forward.  It was honestly one of the best gifts to my life to represent you.  Thank you for your trust, your friendship, and your honor to me and my firm.  You're an amazing man, and I'm so blessed that I was able to help you.  I will continue to follow you and your girlies' journey, moving forward.  I pray peace and love upon you.  Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for this tonight.  I cannot tell you how much it means to me.
Thank you!

reviews.text: I practiced law for many years and have had the opportunity to work with many lawyers over my 40yr career. Michele Braukmann is one of the very top, most competent, knowledgeable, caring, compassionate, and fair lawyer that I have had the pleasure of working with.   She is a genuine human being who is assertive and aggressive where appropriate. She was invaluable in helping me navigate my complex wrongful discharge claim against one of the largest and best known tech brands.  Her team is just as strong.  From my first call with her paralegal, the quality of the practice was apparent.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Steve! We were honored to work with you.  Hope all is well!

reviews.text: I had the best experience working with Michele and Meridian Law. This was my first time needing legal representation, and she guided me through every step. It meant everything that she believed in me and was fighting for me during a difficult time. She is extremely knowledgeable about Montana law, and worked tirelessly for a successful result. She listens intentionally, gives realistic counsel, and truly cares for her clients. I cannot thank her enough!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Paul:  Thank you so much for the incredibly kind words and amazing review.  We were honored to be able to assist you.  You are a wonderful person, and you are exactly the type of client that we hope to be able to assist, when you're faced with a difficult situation that you need support and advocacy for.  Thank you for trusting us, honoring us with your legal representation, and for being someone who always listened with an open mind to our recommendations.  We know your future is so bright, and we cannot wait to see where the World takes you.  Stay in touch!  All of our best!

reviews.text: Having nowhere left to go with a traumatizing experience, I reached out to Michelle with Meridian Law. Immediately, her professional decorum along with ability to empathize with the challenges we were facing put me at ease. At no point was Michelle hiding the harsh realities of potential outcomes, while still giving hope and reassurance that the fight we were getting into was worth fighting. She showed genuine care, understanding, and patience as we navigated murky waters together. She listened to our desired outcomes and met them with reality. If you want someone who will actually listen to what you have to say and support you in your fight, Meridian Law would undoubtedly do that for you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Marie:  What an incredibly humbling and beautiful review of our work.  You are an exceptional person, and it was truly our honor to work with you and your family.  As we spoke about, through these trials, great things come, and I know what an amazing asset you are to your new employer.  Thank you for trusting in us, believing in our advice, and working with us to try to remedy what was a situation that you should never have been put in.  Working with clients like you is exactly why we do this work -- to try to help people through these most difficult moments.  I look very much forward to staying in touch, and knowing how many lives you will continue to change with your leadership!  Thank you for taking the time to leave such a humbling review!  And, Happy Father's Day to your lovely husband!

reviews.text: I presented an extremely complicated and severely off track family law case to Meridian Law. I had already been told “no” by 7 other attorneys. Meridian Law not only took on this huge task, but did so with expertise, skill and absolute passion. Michele did not relent until everything in my case was under control. Having Meridian Law representing my kids and I was nothing short of miraculous. Michele invests in her clients and their wellbeing relentlessly, her attentiveness, compassion and dedication brought a speedy and once in a life time resolution to my case. With the exceptional skill and professionalism of Meridian Law, I received a better outcome than I ever could have dreamed of. Thank you, and forever grateful ~Kate M.
reviews.ownerResponse: Kate:  We are so honored by your review.  This is nothing short of incredibly humbling to us.  We are honored to have worked with you and to know you.  We cannot wait to see what the future continues to hold for you!

reviews.text: I had the very best experience with Meridian Law! Michelle was kind, professional, and knowledgeable with uncommonly prompt communication so there was no leaving a message with someone in the office and anxiously waiting for days for a response. She was incredibly ethical and just really helped me navigate difficult choices during a difficult season.  I would recommend her to anybody needing legal representation as someone they could trust to know the law and be fair but fierce.
reviews.ownerResponse: I literally cried reading this, Katherine.  Honestly, I don't feel deserving of these words, but this is exactly why I do this work.  To truly make a difference in other's lives, during difficult seasons.  You are an exceptional woman, filled with grace and goodness, and it is my honor to have represented you.  Your future is so incredibly bright, and I cannot wait to be witness to all of the happiness that you have in front of you!  Thank you for your trust and faith in me and my law firm.
Thank you so much!  It was a pleasure to assist you.  Thank you for the sweet gift card.  Don't hesitate to let me know if I can help out at anytime in the future.  Have a great 2023!
Thank you! It was such an honor representing you!

Paul Gallardo took my case after I had met with a couple local attorneys. He negotiated a fair payment based on my needs, and read my repetitive emails. For me, he was the legal voice that ran interference. He listened, gathered information, and not only formulated a defense, but developed tactical offense while seeming to be benign. He's the real deal. (I was ready to battle to death and the case was dismissed.) The line between what happened and what they "say" happened only has your attorney between you and it. Don't bury your head in the sand. Give them a call, find the money.

If you are on the other side...These guys are a bad day. They are smart and deticated to their clients. They will make you work for it. They will treat you fairly, and be good mediators, but could also hand you your ass if you aren't prepared. Paul will disarm even the most venemous client, he has both the whip-smart legal mind and the charm to be best friends with your them, and witnesses them before they hit the stand. Plus, he is genuinely a good guy. If he takes a case, I get the feeling he will fight for his client in an honorable way. That might mean a reasonable settlement or plea. Sometimes thats best for everyone. Try to meet him somewhere, IF he gives you an offer it's fair.

.

Colin Delli Bovi is an above average lawyer, an excellent facade and a master time waster.

Maybe its the politics

Maybe its some deep seated internal conflict

Maybe its never having faced any true stuggles in that make a man like this.

But when I hired Colin to act as my defense, it turned out the only person he was defending was himself and his ego.

Colin used every piece of information he gained from me to protect himself before dropping the case on me cold turkey, and costing me more than I paid him by an insurmoutable (and growing) number

Do your research.

Look deeply.

Many such cases, some will come to light sooner than others.

Your time and freedom are worth more than Colins ego and reputational value.

Colin Delli Bovi and his associates literally saved my life. I was facing a maximum of 150 years for a crime it did not commit, and hiring that was the best decision I ever made. The evidence was there, figure it out and do what was right, I honestly believe I'd be in prison right now, and they even die there. His team performed well beyond my expectations of what was even possible, and it's because of them that I'm out living my life right now. Their costs are in line with what you should expect to pay for decent legal representation. Anybody charging less, shouldn't be trusted.  I don't have the words Paula and there's not enough I can say to express just how grateful I am to this law firm.

From the beginning, this whole law firm has been very helpful and a blessing. When I first came to the office, the divorce attorney was not in so I spoke to Sam and told him my situation. He was very kind and listened, which was all I needed in that moment. Few days later I got a call from Colin to meet up. I prayed Colin would be a great fit for me and he was just that. Colin was very kind and patient with me throughout the whole divorce process. Even when I would ask the same questions because I would forget and come to him with some crazy requests, Colin never once made me feel insecure with my questions or made me feel less than. He would give me great advice on how to speak to my ex in a constructive way and all I wanted to do was just was record every word because I always admired how soft and graceful he was with his words as a male. I had never been used to that respect and grace when speaking to my ex so I was very grateful how respectful he was.
When I say the whole office is great, I mean every single one of them including Chrissy! She was so sweet every time I would come in and would check in on how things were going with me. She even offered to help me watch my 4 yo when I had to bring him a couple times. I also truly appreciated how much the attorneys help out each other. Ben was also very kind and gave his military background advice when needed. They work as a family and I was grateful for each and every one of them. My divorce process was quicker than I thought it would be. I’m truly blessed to have had someone on my corner throughout the whole process and had my back! Thank you for all you have done Delli Bovi, Martin & Reed & Chrissy!! God Bless you and your families.

Colin got my charge reduced so much that I no longer have to worry about life altering repercussions. He was kind, always responsive, and willing to listen without judgment. He patiently and thoroughly answered every question I had, explaining each step of the process as the case went along. I initially called him on a Sunday afternoon and he made time to meet with me and discuss the case the very next day. He managed to provide some reassurance without overpromising from the first meeting. He is very clearly an excellent defense attorney but he's also a great guy who knows how to treat people with empathy and compassion. I could not be more satisfied with Colin's service and the outcome of the case.

This attorney wasn’t even named in an anonymous social media post about harassment, yet replied multiple times in an unprofessional (borderline harassing) manner, including naming the potential poster directly when he/she clearly desired to remain anonymous. Obviously counsel had no responsibility of confidentiality to someone who isn’t his client but the lack of discretion is concerning for the context of confidentiality nonetheless. In this example at least, one of the attorneys at this firm did not conduct himself in a very ethical or professional manner. I have no relationship with the original poster nor do I know his/her identity.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Cassandra, we truly appreciate you taking an interest in our firm. As you noted, you are not involved in the matter, so we cannot discuss details publicly. Our firm remains committed to professionalism, ethics, and client confidentiality.

The original author of the post you are referencing is a member of an opposing party. They are not our client, and this has been nothing more than a smear campaign.

After my car accident, I was contacted by the opposing party's insurance company and encouraged to accept a shockingly low settlement — one that didn't even begin to cover my medical bills at the time. To make matters worse, I had developed a severe speech disorder shortly after the accident due to head trauma. Despite the clear difficulty I had speaking, the insurance company insisted I was "fine" and suggested I no longer needed medical care. It was deeply disheartening, and I felt dismissed and helpless.

Thankfully, I was referred to Ross Johnson. From the first conversation, Ross assured me that he would advocate for me — and he truly meant it. I do not exaggerate when I say that hiring Ross was one of the best decisions I’ve ever made for myself. He listened to me, believed in me, and fought tirelessly on my behalf.

Over the course of my case, Ross and his incredible paralegal, Rubina Dann, were not only professional and responsive — they were compassionate and encouraging. Every time I had a question or needed clarity, they responded quickly and thoughtfully. Even when I felt I was out of options, they encouraged me to continue seeking medical answers and to push for the proper diagnosis of my condition. Without their support, I likely would have given up trying to make sense of the neurological symptoms I was experiencing.

Two years later, I still deal with the effects of that accident, but thanks to Ross and Rubina’s dedication, I was awarded a settlement that brought me to tears. Not because of the amount — but because it gives me the chance to continue receiving treatment and striving toward recovery. I did not think the progression I have had over the past two years was even close to attainable during the exceptionally difficult days, but I feel so honored to be blessed by their representation and so proud of the perseverance I found in myself.

I cannot recommend Ross Johnson and his team enough. They gave me more than legal representation — they gave me hope.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your story — and for putting your trust in Ross and our team after such a difficult experience. Facing a traumatic head injury after a car accident is incredibly overwhelming, especially when the insurance company tries to downplay what you’re going through. We’re so glad we could stand beside you and help make sure your voice was heard.

At Kovacich Snipes Johnson, we’re proud to be Montana personal injury lawyers who truly care about our clients — not just the case, but the person behind it. Your resilience throughout your recovery has been nothing short of inspiring, and we’re honored to have been a part of that journey.

reviews.text: They got back to me right away. Fast customer service

Without directly naming the person, I would just like to caution any potential future clients to ask lots of questions before paying any retainers to the legal team. My lawyer not only cost me thousands of dollars but also lost my case due to lack of information and initiative. I was lied to, told that my custody hearing would consist of just myself, my ex and both lawyers, and to not bring witnesses. I had to fly from AZ for this event as it was, and when I arrived the day prior to the hearing, I was told to only focus on the information that she had deemed important, thus leaving out crucial points that worked to my favor, including the father's multiple DUI and drug charges, as well as the domestic abuse evidence. On the day of the hearing, I walked into the court room and was met with not only my ex, but an additional 8 witnesses and was blindsided. My lawyer did nothing to remedy this situation, did not say a word when I pointed out the lies that were being told on the stand, and wouldn't listen to my desire to postpone the hearing due to having 10 people against me, and no one to back up my side of things. This resulted in me losing custody after being a single mom for 4 1/2 years, to the father that never wanted to spend more than a day alone with his child, and lied to impress the judge and make me look unstable. Further from that, she introduced the idea of me paying them child support after the father and I had agreed to create a joint savings fund for the child separate from the court rulings.  Nearly 2 years later I'm still fighting and having to deal with the father not following the court appointed parenting plan, and not adequately caring for the child. Be careful who you trust with your legal action.

I have also worked in the legal field for years with some of the state's top firms and lawyers and I have 4 years of law school behind me. I know the privacy of keeping clients information confidential. My husband was also a running candidate in Montana. To share our personal information to represent a client to collect a debt on us is unethical. When we called to speak about the issue, we were told (rudely) that we never paid for services (which I have receipt) that they never shared our bank information, but didn’t deny that they are representing the client against us, in fact ask how we can settle the debt. I will be filing a complaint with ODC and up and will continue until disciplinary act is met.

I am incredibly tardy with this review, but it was most definitely earned, so I wanted to make sure I shared my experience. I cannot recommend Spoon Gordon highly enough. If you need legal representation for a personal injury case, you can stop searching and just give them a call. I promise, you won't be disappointed.

In April 2024, my son was hit by a car while walking across a street. He sustained a severe TBI and other physical injuries, as well as the emotional trauma he and I both felt. Having never dealt with anything like this, I sought legal representation so I could focus on my son's recovery versus dealing with law enforcement, courts, and insurance agencies.

I interviewed five different attorneys in Missoula, and Dan Spoon quickly rose to the top. He asked questions no other attorney asked me to make sure he understood our situation, he gave me advice on things I should watch out for (before I even hired him), and most of all, his genuine caring nature and authenticity was beyond any of the others I interviewed. It was a clear and easy choice!

Dan and his team quickly, efficiently, and with great caring got us the settlement we needed so I could focus on my son and his ongoing recovery. What astounded me was that it was just a few months versus years!

Dan was supported by Kristi D, who is a god-send! Kristi and Dan kept me informed every step of the way, and never missed a week without checking in with me to provide me an update on what was happening with our case. Further, on days when I had to provide or discuss difficult details or statements to support the case, Kristi never failed to follow-up with me and provide support, encouragement, and empathy for what we were dealing with. It made a world of difference!

Thank you, Dan, Kristi, and team for being a critical part of helping my family through an incredibly difficult time period. We can't thank you enough, and I hope this review helps you remember that you truly make a difference in this world!

Deb Colby

We had a local supplier hit one of our trucks with a forklift, and they ran us in circles for over a month, but they were still not fixing it. After expressing that we needed it in a timely fashion due to a trip they told us to go on the trip and we would have to start the entire claims process over and denied providing insurance claim information. We reached out to Bryan, and after explaining the situation, he sent a letter to them within 10 minutes requesting resolve. In less than a week, we had all of our claim information, so we no longer had to go through their corporate office to handle the damage.

Bryan is always helpful and has his clients' well-being in mind. He also gets the job done in a timely fashion.

reviews.text:
I had the privilege of working with Bryan Spoon, an exceptional attorney who demonstrated an unwavering commitment to my case. From start to finish, his dedication to my best interests was remarkable. The experience was characterized by impeccable communication skills, timely execution of tasks, and a welcoming atmosphere.

Right from our first interaction, it was clear Bryan had an exceptional ability to listen and understand the nuances of my situation. Every step of the way, I felt informed and involved.  His transparency in explaining the legal process and potential outcomes, provided me with a clear understanding of where my case was headed.

One of the standout qualities of Bryan was his respect for my time. Meetings and updates were always conducted promptly, and any questions or concerns I had were addressed right away.

The legal advice provided was not only thorough but also tailored to my family's specific circumstances. It was clear that Bryan possessed a deep understanding of the law. His expertise, coupled with his ability to explain legal concepts in a way that was easy to grasp, left me feeling confident in the decisions we made together.

I must also highlight the incredible team that surrounded Bryan. His team members were not only knowledgeable and skilled but also approachable and friendly. The collaborative atmosphere they fostered contributed to the overall positive experience.

In summary, Bryan's outstanding communication, legal sharpness, and dedication to my case provided me and my family with a settlement we deserved.  If you are seeking an attorney who goes above and beyond, respects your time, and provides unparalleled legal support, I recommend reaching out to Bryan Spoon, and his amazing team.

Exceptional Legal Guidance - Highly Recommended!

Working with Bryan Spoon was an absolute pleasure. He and his team expertly guided me through the entire legal process, ensuring I had a clear understanding at every step. From the beginning, Bryan accurately predicted the case's trajectory, managing my expectations effectively.

Bryan's communication skills were impeccable. He and his office staff regularly checked in and kept me informed throughout the processes, making me feel supported and well-informed.

His profound understanding of the law surpassed that of the opposing parties, giving me a strong sense of confidence in his representation. Moreover, Bryan's strong grasp of the law ensured that the insurance company treated us fairly. As a result, we received the rightful portion of the settlement we were entitled to.

I wholeheartedly recommend Bryan Spoon and his entire office team to anyone in need of outstanding legal counsel. Thank you, Bryan, for your exceptional service!

My husband was rear-ended in a catastrophic MVA last August.  The driver was uninsured and our lives have been completely destroyed.  I searched for someone to help us manage through all the legal issues including helping see if there is any potential payment for my husbands mind-boggling medical bills.  Bryan Spoon and his team have been a true blessing.  I have had all my questions answered quickly, his team have been handling all the bills, negotiating with providers for lower payment to make our paltry car insurance go as far as possible.
My spouse faces years of recovery -  but he is recovering.  I am able to pay full attention to his medical needs and various therapies because this team has been a pillar of compassionate, kind and consistent care.  As residents of rural Montana, I was deeply appreciative of the fact that Bryan is Montana born and bred and understands the culture.
Like most boomer-age folks, I have grown up with the full menu of lawyer jokes and caricatures of greedy, fast-talking, attorneys.  I WILL NEVER make a lawyer joke ever again.  You can put your lives into the hands of this team and can be assured that they will handle your problems with kindness, honesty and your best interests at heart.  I can give Spoon and Gordon my highest recommendation.

I had the pleasure of working with Spoon and Gordon for my case and I couldn't be more impressed with the level of service and dedication I received. They took the time to explain everything to me in detail and made sure I understood every step of the way. They were always available to answer any questions I had and kept me informed on the progress of my case. Not to mention the great settlement Brian Spoon and his team helped me achieve. I highly recommend Spoon and Gordon to anyone in need of representation. They are a top-notch law firm with a team of highly skilled attorneys who truly care about their clients. I am forever grateful for their help and support during a difficult time.

Bryan and his team are absolutely amazing!

Through the (affordable) power of her legal expertise, the reputation she has built for herself in her community, and the ability to execute a plan which required adaptation I am able to now type this while next to my beloved dog, a free human being. Every person I interacted with at this firm was pleasant, helpful, and made it clear that I was both welcome and my business wanted there. I will be a lifelong client of Sarah's up until she retires or answers the eventual call of the bench to a judicial appointment.

reviews.text:
Five-Star Review for Bradley Jones at Doubek, Pyfer & Storrar

I cannot thank Bradley Jones and the team at Doubek, Pyfer & Storrar enough for their outstanding support after I was rear-ended in a car crash. From the very beginning, Bradley went above and beyond to ensure I received the medical attention I needed and that all my medical bills were handled with care.

Bradley was professional, empathetic, and highly knowledgeable throughout the entire process. He helped me navigate the complex legal and insurance matters, making sure I understood my rights and options every step of the way. Thanks to his expertise, I was able to focus on my recovery without the added stress of dealing with the financial aftermath of the accident.

His persistence and dedication to my case ensured that I got the medical treatment I needed and that the costs associated with it were covered. I’m so grateful for the peace of mind Bradley provided during such a stressful time. If you're ever in need of legal help after an accident, I wholeheartedly recommend Bradley Jones and the team at Doubek, Pyfer & Storrar—they truly care about their clients' well-being and work tirelessly to get the best possible outcome.

Thank you again, Bradley, for everything!

~James~
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear James, thank you for your heartfelt review and kind words about Bradley Jones and our team at Doubek, Pyfer & Storrar. We are thrilled to hear that Bradley’s dedication and expertise made such a positive impact during your recovery. It’s our utmost priority to provide our clients with the care and support they deserve, especially in challenging times. We are extremely grateful for your trust and recommendation. Should you require any assistance in the future, please do not hesitate to reach out. Wishing you continued health and peace of mind. Warm regards, the Doubek, Pyfer & Storrar Team.

Jonathan was wonderful - professional, knowledgeable, efficient, caring, and compassionate.  The office staff were also wonderful. Jonathan is a wonderful representative of this firm, and if all of the attorneys in this firm are like Jonathan, you can't go wrong with hiring any of them.  I would recommend Jonathan and this firm to anyone and I would definitely hire this firm to represent me if I needed them in the future.

Our journey with Boland Aarab started about 2 years ago. Our property flooded twice within 2 months due to a plugged city culvert. I called every lawyer in the state of Montana when the city of White Sulphur Springs, along with their insurance company Montana Municipal Interlocal Authority denied us with a 100 year storm threshold in June, even though we presented MMIA with photos of the plugged culvert, they knew the city had brought an excavator up to clear it out and  they knew we had flooded previously in April.  Sam called to check back in with us after I first initially called for help and they were the only people who would listen to our story when nobody else would. We were up against a beast, a city and an insurance company and it was a challenge we were told many times, we would not succeed in holding accountable. I am here to tell you, last week we took the city of White Sulphur Springs to the court room and with Sam and Caitlin's expertise, WE WON!!!!!! I have had so many people from our community stop into our work to congratulate us and thank us for the courage to stand up to a government entity for accountability that has been so long overdue.  I have also had people say how much they enjoyed watching Sam and Caitlin work together in the courtroom.  These two fought 3 days for my family, house and community and for that I will never be able to repay them. I also cannot forget to mention their paralegal Lisa Conley....one of the most amazing, sweet people you will get to work with through your case. I honestly consider Boland Aarab more like family than our lawyers ❤️❤️ thank you Boland Aarab!!!!

reviews.text: Gave them 2 years of trust, doing everything I was told. But when Syd lost her footing as the trial neared, with the loss of another case, she withdrew and left me hanging. Abandoned by the firm through no fault of my own, it was nearly impossible to find another firm available and willing to take on my case. Only with the compassion of my caregivers who fought for my rights, was I able to get any settlement on my injuries. Thank God for Gordon Spoon!

James Gardner at Big Sky Justice, P.C. helped me through a long custody battle involving my daughter, and I am extremely grateful for what he did for our family. He took my case in May 2023 to pursue primary custody. In April 2024, we won primary custody. In July 2024, he helped us win again after an objection to the standing master’s order. Then in July 2025, when my ex tried to bring me back to court again, James stepped in once more and helped us maintain primary custody without having to go through another full court fight.

What stood out most was how prepared and knowledgeable he was every time it mattered. In court, James knew my case down to the smallest details. He understood the law, the terminology, and the strategy at a level that was honestly impressive to watch. Whenever the other side raised an issue, he had an answer and knew how to respond.

This was a long and stressful process, but James helped protect my daughter and helped us keep primary custody. What he did for my family meant a great deal to us, and I would Highly recommend him to anyone who needs a strong, knowledgeable family law attorney.
worthless

Hiring Big Sky Justice was the best decision I made after getting two separate speeding tickets while on a long cross-country road trip. The team of Mr. Garner (superstar lawyer) and Ms. Legreid (extraordinary paralegal) was phenomenal.  They handled everything; filings, negotiations, and virtual appearances—with total professionalism.  The result?  The tickets were dismissed or reduced which saved my driving record and insurance.  I wouldn’t hesitate to hire this team again (but I hope I don’t have to!).
Thank you so much, I really appreciate your firms hard work. Mr. James was an absolute razor tack with how sharp and on point he was.

I left a voice mail for Mr. Gardner and he called me back promptly.   I explained the situation to him and he genuinely cared about my brother's predicament.  Mr. Gardner went to see him the very next day and facilitated his release.  Mr
Gardner kept in touch with me as well.  He navigated a tough situation and the outcome was nothing short of a miracle.   I believe God guided me to call Mr. Gardner.  I am thankful my brother was rescued by this wonderful man.  It was divine intervention and I thank God for His grace and mercy.

You can trust Big Sky Justice, James Gardner, will do what is right and just for you.  He's definitely one of the good guys.  ❤️

Mr. Gardner is an amazing Attorney.  I hired him to take care of my significant legal issues. He’s highly competent , fast/efficient with Attorney tasks and always kept me informed.

He truly cares for his clients and puts their needs at high priority.

Highest Recommendation for Mr. Gardner if you need solid a solid Attorney that’ll exceed your expectations.
James Gardner and his assistant Kaylynn did and amazing job with my dui case and I would highly recommend them to anyone

James has been my attorney for the past four years, representing me in a very challenging family law case. This involved contesting a common law marriage claim, an unjust enrichment claim, a child support dispute, multiple mediations, a TOP, and a parenting plan. He went above and beyond in assisting me, answering my questions, and navigating the family court system. I am extremely grateful to him and highly recommend him to anyone needing a lawyer. He is professional, yet very personable, always asking about my kids. I genuinely felt that he cared about my family and our situation and that we weren't just another case he had to get through. I know for a fact that I wouldn't have achieved the outcomes I did without his help. He is a shark in the courtroom, which is exactly what you need when dealing with an abusive ex-partner. James was always on top of everything, never missing any important details, which was incredible considering how extensive my case had become over the years. I will always be grateful for everything he has done for me and my kiddos.
James did a great job getting the charges dropped. His staff was really good and very knowledgeable.

In July 2024 I found myself in need of personal legal advice.  I contacted James at Big Sky Justice for professional advice.

Amazingly, James met with me the same day I contacted his office  and spent over an hour advising me regarding my issue.

Upon completing our meeting I asked what I owed for his service.  James told me he does not charge for an initial consultation and I did not owe him for the time he spent advising me.  Amazing!

Not feeling it was fair to not pay James for his service, I sent him a letter and check for what I thought was his hourly rate.

The check I sent never cleared my bank account , so today I called James' office and found out that James had voided the check that I sent his firm

I can't speak more highly of James and the service he provided me.  My experience truely is in sharp contrast to the horror stories people tell regarding their lawyer experiences.

I want to express my thanks to James and highly recommend Big Sky Justice should you find yourself in need of legal services.

Darrell Block

James is a very personal lawyer I've ever had . I would recommend him any time.
He's straight up and forward about what to do. His advice is 100%
Thank you James!
James and his office staff were incredible to me for my case. Very dedicated and helpful, would recommend to all my friends and family, absolutely! Thank you guys for all you have done for me!

Id definitely would use him again ! Hopefully  that won't  happen . My fingers crossed 🤞  Lol ! THANKS KRAIG MOORE

I would absolutely recommend Kraig Moore and his front desk team to anyone needing an attorney. They made the process we needed so much easier for my family and I.
If you need a great attorney Kraig and his front desk team are the ones to chose.
The most professional, efficient and kind law office i’ve ever dealt with.

I can’t recommend this law firm enough. They won my automotive-related case and made the entire process incredibly smooth from start to finish. Even though everything was handled from a distance, communication was always easy and timely — every question I had was answered clearly and quickly. The team was fast, effective, and extremely professional, while also being genuinely friendly and supportive. Their dedication and attention to detail truly stood out. I would 100% recommend them to anyone looking for reliable, top-notch legal representation.
Kraig Moore is a fierce advocate for those needing representation to navigate personal injury law. Kraig is a consummate professional you can trust.

I worked with Christopher for too long. If you want someone that cares about your case and places effort into it, do NOT hire him. He did me a MASSIVE disservice and should be disbarred. This review will be anonymous for reasons but deemed important enough to spread the word.
If you’re considering using him, run while you have the chance - he  may cost you custody of your own children due to his lack of efforts placed. The way Christopher operates is on his terms solely, if he doesn’t like your beliefs even if it’s the right thing to do, he will not place effort into your case. He believes his “advice” as a dictatorship. He will intimate you as a ploy to do what he says and the use of manipulation towards his own clients is disturbing.
He has poor communication skills and has proven to many he should have retired before taking on another case. Run now while you have the chance, there are plenty of hungry attorneys out there that will fight for justice and still not run through your money. This man does not understand ethics. Run.

Chris is an excellent attorney. He is honest, attentive, caring, knowledgeable and had a great way of keeping me focused (direct).  I highly recommend. He was on point with outcomes and always quick to return calls etc. His prices are reasonable compared to others. It is obvious he loves to help people. Thank you Chris!
Absolutely amazing attorney to work with, got my case no quick and for a reasonable price, I would definitely recommend to anyone!

Chris was excellent to work with during this most stressful time of my life, he put me at ease and worked diligently on my behalf. Chris is extremely intelligent,grounded in reality very fair and honest.Chris will not waste your time or money! Can't thank him enough and I highly recommend him. Chris's  secretary is awesome too!

Called in for help. Receptionist  took my information said Chris would call me back. 2 days later I took the initiative to call back and see what was going on, she said that Chris was not linger taking clients do tobeing  busy.

I can't thank Chris enough for the support and guidance during my child custody case. From our very first conversation, he was professional, understanding, and completely committed to helping me through one of the most difficult times in my life.
Chris was always responsive, clear in his communication, and genuinely cared about what was best for my child and me. He gave me confidence when I felt overwhelmed, and his expertise and calm approach made all the difference in court.
Thanks to Chris, I felt supported every step of the way and achieved a positive outcome. I highly recommend him to anyone needing a strong, compassionate custody lawyer!
Chris is an excellent lawyer and a person of strong character.

Scott,

reviews.text:
Chris was attentive, knowledgeable and thorough. He guided me through a difficult family law case and it came out in my favor. I couldn't be more happy with his services.

Thank you Chris, I am forever grateful. ❤️

Chris was amazing to work with. Divorce is already stressful enough and Chris put my mind at ease and was not one to sugar coat anything. He has an amazing knowledge base on any situation that is involved with each specific case.  He will not lead you on a wasteful journey. He gets to the point and does not waste your money! He is easy to get ahold of as needed. He is great at what he does and understands what will and will not work best for your case! If you want a true blue, hard working guy for your case Chris is the one I would hire. My mind is at ease with my outcome as it was a very complicated case with kids, assets and debts. in the end I am extrememy satisfied with the results!

Chris was amazing to work with. He helped with my case and got everything I was asking for plus some! His price is great compared to the others I called. I would highly recommend him to help you with your case. I know he'll continue to be my go to if I have issues! Thank you for everything.
Very upfront.  Doesn't sugar coat. Efficient and personable
Chris helped all the way and got what I want. He’s very understanding and will guide you on the right way. I am happy on the result and happy working with Chris. :)

Chris helped me with my custody case and was amazing to deal with. He went above and beyond for me. When my court date came around he did absolutely great and got me more than I ever thought I was going to get. My child is now safe and healthy because of Chris!

Chris has represented my wife and I in 2 separate family court hearing over the past year and a half. Both hearings went heavily in our favor. All documents were submitted in a timely manner and communication was clear throughout. Great trial demeanor and good standing with the local judges. No surprise charges, very fair. Would recommend for family law!
I couldn’t have asked for a better family lawyer! Chris goes above and beyond to help his clients! I recommend him to everyone needing a lawyer!

I have known Chris for 22 years, and he has proven to be caring, professional, and very effective in all my dealings with him.  He makes sure that he understands the history,  needs, & goals of each case, and works diligently to achieve the proper outcome.  His experience in working within the system, and with the players involved cannot be overstated.  He does not take shortcuts, and takes the time necessary in working with clients to assure that he has the complete picture before moving forward.  Again, what stands out is that Chris is very effective because he is very good at what he does, and he genuinely cares for his clients.

I am in a custody battle, trying to move out of state with my son.  Chris was able to make that happen.  He has represented me very well. I am more then pleased with the outcome and my decision to choose him as my attorney!

Chris is amazing! Hands down the best lawyer I have ever worked with. He helped me with my custody battle and I couldn't be happier with the outcome. Chris is absolutely amazing and I would recommend him to anybody.
Tucker Gannett is such a friendly very respectful person. He is a phenomenal advocate to have in your corner especially when you are at a point that you are in need.

Robert Erickson was absolutely outstanding. From the moment we chose his services, we knew we had made the right decision. His professionalism was evident in every interaction. He communicated clearly, stayed proactive, and kept us fully informed throughout the entire process. Every update was timely, every step was explained, and he never left us guessing about what came next.

What stood out most was his diligence. Robert handled our case as if it were his own, paying attention to details most people would overlook and always staying one step ahead. He was steady, reliable, and confident in exactly the way you hope your attorney will be during stressful situations.

We are extremely grateful for the work he put in. Choosing Robert was the best decision we could have made, and we would recommend him without hesitation to anyone who needs an attorney who truly cares and delivers results.
A fantastic team of lawyers that really helped me understand the legal issues, and provided expert advice and guidance
Professional and thorough.  Our experience is with the Siefert portion of this office only.

If I could leave 100 stars I would. Nicole helped me out a great deal, was extremely professional yet personable and prompt with any new developments. This was my first and hopefully last time needing a lawyer but if I ever do again, this organization is my first call.
Best lawyers in Montana.

Quentin Rhoades is a rarity among attorneys.  He is honest and he is good at his profession.  He sorted out some very sticky legal matters for myself and my wife. We were sued and I told my wife we were looking into the abyss, although we had done nothing wrong.

The attorneys we had in the past and before we retained Quentin seemed to only get our names correct on our billing statement (and we had some quite well known firms in Missoula) and nothing else.  With Quentin representing us, we countersued and prevailed and collected over $250k from the plaintiffs.

Quentin Rhoades excellent in the courtroom as well.  Judges seem to like and respect him.
The best
Knowledgeable and professional.  A pleasure to work with!

I had my will/trust created by Mr. McCarty recently.    It was done very well and it gave me the comfort of having my papers done correctly and to my wishes.    A very awesome firm and I have conveyed these sentiments to all my friends.

We sought Montana Estate Lawyers P.C. Via recommendation from a personal friend. We found John and staff to be extremely professional and knowledgeable. As a result whole process of setting up our will (and POA’s) was very low stress!
We highly recommend them. Thank you!

This firm is simply sensational to work with. They are experts in every aspect of will & trust advice & preparation, and felt like family as we moved through the process.  We feel so fortunate to have had them recommended to us.

My experience with Trevor Funseth and his legal assistant  Chafaye was outstanding.  Being in another state, they made the process very smooth.
